calendar.matters:
Report Of Trustee On Account And Petition For Settlement Thereof And For Approval Of Certain Acts
Off Calendar Jun-12-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Bernhard for Sandra Gale (Trustee).

The Court noted that Mr. Oliveri was not present, stated that they had a one day trial on May 2, 2014 and that the Court was advised on May 29, 2014 that Mr. Oliveri was withdrawing his objections to the account and inquired if they had to appear on May 30, 2014 (day two of trial), and that they were told that they did not. Mr. Bernhard verified today that Mr. Oliveri did withdraw his objection. In addition pursuant to CCP section 1952 (c), the Court is returning the exhibits to the Party that introduced them (done in open court). The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Report Of Trustee On Account And Petition For Settlement Thereof And For Approval Of Certain Acts
Off Calendar May-30-2014 Continued To Jun-03-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Report Of Trustee On Account And Petition For Settlement Thereof And For Approval Of Certain Acts
Off Calendar May-02-2014 Continued To May-30-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Report Of Trustee On Account And Petition For Settlement Thereof And For Approval Of Certain Acts
Off Calendar Mar-25-2014 Continued To May-02-14 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Bernhard for Sandra Gale (Petitioner/Trustee). Matthew Oliveri appeared by telephone for Christopher McGuire.

Mr. Bernhard stated that they exchanged letters, that he believes they have provided everything that was requested and that he does not know what else they can provide. Mr. Oliveri stated that did not make any progress, suggested a referral to mediation, coming back or setting the matter for trial. Mr. Bernhard also stated that opposing Parties have an issue with the $60,000.00 staging cost, that the property sold for $29,500,000.00, that the Trustee made a loan to the Trust to pay partial taxes and that they have a problem with the Trustee being paid interest on the loan. Counsel indicated that the trial should be no more than two half days. The report of Trustee on account and petition for settlement thereof was set for trial on May 2, 2014 at 1:30 p.m. and May 9, 2014 at 1:30 p.m., in Dept. 204. Any briefs, witness lists, exhibit lists and motions in limine are to be filed by April 28, 2014.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Report Of Trustee On Account And Petition For Settlement Thereof And For Approval Of Certain Acts
Off Calendar Mar-11-2014 Continued To Mar-25-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Bernhard for Sandra Gale (Trustee).

Mr. Bernhard stated that he was told by Beneficiaries Counsel that he was unable to be present and requested a continuance. The Report of Trustee on Account and Petition for Settlement Thereof, etc. was continued to March 25, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Bernhard will notify opposing Counsel.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Report Of Trustee On Account And Petition For Settlement Thereof And For Approval Of Certain Acts
Off Calendar Feb-04-2014 Continued To Mar-11-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Bernhard for Sandra Gale. Matthew Oliveri for and with Christopher McGuire (Beneficiary).

Mr. Oliveri stated that he does not have all of the facts, that he does not have documents, that he needs more information, and suggested a continuance for exchange of information and a referral to mediation. The Report of Trustee on Account, etc. was continued to March 11, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Oliveri to send communication to Mr. Bernhard as to what he is requesting and for Mr. Bernhard to evaluate what informatiion he can provide.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Report Of Trustee On Account And Petition For Settlement Thereof And For Approval Of Certain Acts
